name: hud_ui_text_label_constructor_with_pos_and_flags
description: HudUiTextLabel::ConstructorWithPosAndFlags constructs the base element, installs the text-label ftable, sets text, position, font handle, and alignment state, and invalidates the element.
known_limits: Depends on HudUiTextLabel::SetTextFmt, which is functionally accepted but remains binary-safe debt.

VC5SP3 cl 11.00.7022 x86 /O2 /Ob1 /GX /Zp4 /FAcs COFF byte comparison for ?ConstructorWithPosAndFlags@HudUiTextLabel@@QAEPAU1@PBDHHH@Z at 0x4bcb50 still fails: 122 unmasked mismatches, 20 relocation bytes masked, 12 trailing VC NOP bytes trimmed, Binary Ninja body is 144 bytes and the VC object symbol is 112 bytes.
binary_safe_evidence: Binary Ninja shows HudUiElement::Constructor, ftable install to g_HudUiTextLabel_FTable, centerText zero, SetTextFmt, x/y writes, invalidation, fontHandle write, second invalidation, alignMode zero, and return self.
The native text-label smoke validates constructor return, ftable identity, text, position, font handle, center/alignment defaults, and invalidation.
